news.title:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.

news.title:
IRDAI grants Allianz Jio Reinsurance Limited certificate to start reinsurance business.
Jio Financial Services Ltd announced this update received on March 12, 2026.
news.summary:
IRDAI grants Allianz Jio Reinsurance Limited certificate to start reinsurance business.
Jio Financial Services Ltd announced this update received on March 12, 2026.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal initiates Buy on Jio Financial with Rs 320 target, citing its innovative platform potential.
Jio Financial expects ~48% PAT CAGR FY26–28E, despite subdued near-term profitability during incubation.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal initiates Buy on Jio Financial with Rs 320 target, citing its innovative platform potential.
Jio Financial expects ~48% PAT CAGR FY26–28E, despite subdued near-term profitability during incubation.

news.title:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs.147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV.
They subscribed to 14.74 crore equity shares to fund JV operations.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs.147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV.
They subscribed to 14.74 crore equity shares to fund JV operations.

news.title: Jio Financial Services offers investment, insurance, and lending products.
news.summary: Jio Financial Services offers investment, insurance, and lending products.

news.title: Jio Financial Services CEO Hitesh Sethia discusses potential for mutual fund AUM to double in 5 years.
news.summary: Jio Financial Services CEO Hitesh Sethia discusses potential for mutual fund AUM to double in 5 years.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services to launch AI-driven 'Financial Fitness Score' for personalised finance.
Initiative includes AI-powered tools, exclusive membership, and integrated financial services platform.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services to launch AI-driven 'Financial Fitness Score' for personalised finance.
Initiative includes AI-powered tools, exclusive membership, and integrated financial services platform.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs.1999.88 crore in Jio Credit Ltd, subscribing to 33,571,923 shares.
This investment aims to support Jio Credit Ltd's business operations.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs.1999.88 crore in Jio Credit Ltd, subscribing to 33,571,923 shares.
This investment aims to support Jio Credit Ltd's business operations.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services updated on its institutional investors' meeting held on Feb 25, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; only public data was discussed.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services updated on its institutional investors' meeting held on Feb 25, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; only public data was discussed.

news.title: Mukesh Ambani pledges $110B for AI development ahead of Jio IPO.
news.summary: Mukesh Ambani pledges $110B for AI development ahead of Jio IPO.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs. 1 crore in Jio Alternative Investment Manager Ltd.
The investment includes 10 lakh equity shares of Rs. 10 each as initial subscription.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services invested Rs. 1 crore in Jio Alternative Investment Manager Ltd.
The investment includes 10 lakh equity shares of Rs. 10 each as initial subscription.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services CRO S. Anantharaman resigns; Sandeep Khetan appointed.
Khetan's 5-year term as Group CRO starts from 23 March 2026.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services CRO S. Anantharaman resigns; Sandeep Khetan appointed.
Khetan's 5-year term as Group CRO starts from 23 March 2026.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services' ownership is led by private companies with a 41% stake, followed by individual investors at 29%.
Top 6 shareholders own over 50% of shares, with Srichakra Commercials LLP holding the largest stake at 12%.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services' ownership is led by private companies with a 41% stake, followed by individual investors at 29%.
Top 6 shareholders own over 50% of shares, with Srichakra Commercials LLP holding the largest stake at 12%.

news.title:
Jio Financial's Co-Chairman predicts the mutual fund industry to double in size in 5 years.
This projection signals strong growth potential in the financial services sector.
news.summary:
Jio Financial's Co-Chairman predicts the mutual fund industry to double in size in 5 years.
This projection signals strong growth potential in the financial services sector.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services partners with BlackRock to launch an investment advice platform.
The platform aims to offer tailored financial solutions to investors.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services partners with BlackRock to launch an investment advice platform.
The platform aims to offer tailored financial solutions to investors.

news.title:
Jio Financial Services has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, Jio Alternative Investment Manager Ltd (JAIML), on Jan 23, 2026.
JAIML will manage an Alternative Investment Fund; Jio invested Rs. 1 crore for 10L shares. No related party or regulatory approvals involved.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Services has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, Jio Alternative Investment Manager Ltd (JAIML), on Jan 23, 2026.
JAIML will manage an Alternative Investment Fund; Jio invested Rs. 1 crore for 10L shares. No related party or regulatory approvals involved.

news.title:
Nifty fell 1.4% to 25,233, its sharpest drop in 9 months, erasing ₹10 lakh crore market cap.
Sensex tumbled 1,066 points; Sun Pharma, Bajaj Finance, Coal India, Jio Financial led losses, Hindustan Zinc gained.
news.summary:
Nifty fell 1.4% to 25,233, its sharpest drop in 9 months, erasing ₹10 lakh crore market cap.
Sensex tumbled 1,066 points; Sun Pharma, Bajaj Finance, Coal India, Jio Financial led losses, Hindustan Zinc gained.

news.title:
Jio Financial Q3 net profit drops to 2.7B INR from 2.95B INR YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to 9B INR, up from 4.4B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Jio Financial Q3 net profit drops to 2.7B INR from 2.95B INR YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to 9B INR, up from 4.4B INR YoY.
